title: Blog Veritabani Semasi
subtitle: Gercek dunya senaryosu: kullanici, yazi, yorum.
code:
-- Kullanicilar
CREATE TABLE users (
    id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
    username VARCHAR(30) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
    email VARCHAR(100) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

-- Blog yazilari
CREATE TABLE posts (
    id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
    user_id INT NOT NULL,
    title VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
    content TEXT,
    published_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)
);

-- Yorumlar
CREATE TABLE comments (
    id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
    post_id INT NOT NULL,
    user_id INT NOT NULL,
    content TEXT NOT NULL,
    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    FOREIGN KEY (post_id) REFERENCES posts(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)
);

-- Ornek veri
INSERT INTO users (username, email) VALUES
    ('ahmet_y', 'ahmet@example.com'),
    ('ayse_k', 'ayse@example.com');

INSERT INTO posts (user_id, title, content) VALUES
    (1, 'Ilk Yazim', 'Bu benim ilk blog yazim!'),
    (2, 'SQL Ipuclari', 'SQL ogrenirken faydali ipuclari...');

INSERT INTO comments (post_id, user_id, content) VALUES
    (1, 2, 'Harika bir baslangic!'),
    (2, 1, 'Cok faydali, tesekkurler.');

-- Her yazinin yazari ve yorum sayisi
SELECT
    p.title,
    u.username AS author,
    COUNT(c.id) AS comment_count
FROM posts p
JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.id
LEFT JOIN comments c ON p.id = c.post_id
GROUP BY p.id, p.title, u.username;
